hero.title: Innovation Lab
hero.description: Fufuzani ma demos oyankhulana, kuyesera, ndi zowonetsera zaukadaulo kuchokera ku gulu lathu la zomangamanga.

hero.title: Innovation Lab
hero.description: Timafufuza malire othandiza mu AI, makina, ndi machitidwe ogawidwa, kenako timamasulira kafukufuku wotsimikizika kukhala mphamvu zodalirika zopanga.

researchAreas.title: Malo Ofufuza
researchAreas.description: Malo aliwonse oyang'ana amagwirizanitsa kafukufuku wofufuza ndi njira zogwiritsira ntchito zomwe zimapangidwira machitidwe enieni.

detailedFocusBriefs.title: Zolemba Zoyang'ana Mwatsatanetsatane
detailedFocusBriefs.description: Ntchito zofufuzira zaposachedwa pakali pano zikuyenda kuchokera ku chitsimikizo cha zomangamanga kupita ku mapulani operekera.

fromLabToProduction.title: Kuchokera ku Lab kupita ku Kupanga
fromLabToProduction.description: Zatsopano ku Horizon zimayesedwa ndi zotsatira zotumizidwa, osati ma prototypes okhaokha.

roadmap.title: Mapu a R &D
roadmap.description: Kupita patsogolo kwapang'onopang'ono kuchokera pakumanga luso kupita ku kusinthasintha, kupitiliza kuwongolera machitidwe.

publications.title: Zofalitsa ndi Kuzindikira
publications.description: Zolemba zaukadaulo ndi zolemba zogwiritsira ntchito kuchokera ku ntchito yatsopano yopitilira.

appliedAi.title: Machitidwe a AI ogwiritsidwa ntchito
appliedAi.description: Zomangamanga za AI zopangidwa zomwe zimaphatikizapo kutumikira chitsanzo, mawonekedwe a orchestration, ndi kuyesa.

automationFrameworks.title: Makina Opangira Makina
automationFrameworks.description: Zida zamkati zogwiritsira ntchito chitetezo chotumizira, kuyankha kwa zochitika, ndi ntchito zobwerezabwereza za zomangamanga.

advancedArchitecture.title: Kuyesera Zomangamanga Zapamwamba
advancedArchitecture.description: Kafukufuku wa zomangamanga zolimba, zogawidwa zomwe zimapangidwira ntchito, kulekerera zolakwika, ndi mlingo.

edgeAndIot.title: Edge Computing & IoT Intelligence
edgeAndIot.description: Nzeru pamphepete kwa zosankha zochepa-latency, kukonza telemetry, ndi kugwirizana kwa zombo za chipangizo.

nlp.title: Kukonza Chilankhulo Chachilengedwe
nlp.description: Mapaipi omvetseta zilankhulo zambiri kuti agawidwe, kutulutsa, kumasulira, ndi machitidwe okambirana.

evolutionaryAlgorithms.title: Evolutionary Algorithms & Optimization
evolutionaryAlgorithms.description: Njira zofufuzira ndi kukonza zomwe zimauziridwa ndi kusankha kwachilengedwe kuti zithetse zovuta zapamwamba za zomangamanga.

automationFrameworks.title: Makina Opangira Makina
automationFrameworks.description: Tikumanga ndondomeko zogwirira ntchito zogwirira ntchito zotulutsa orchestration, zipata zabwino, ndi kutsimikiziridwa pambuyo pa kutumiza kuti muchepetse mikangano yamanja pamene tikuwongolera kudalirika.

advancedArchitecture.title: Kuyesera Zomangamanga Zapamwamba
advancedArchitecture.description: Zoyeserera zathu zomangamanga zimayang'ana pa njira zowonongeka kwa utumiki, njira zowonongeka za mtanda, ndi maenvulopu ogwira ntchito kwa machitidwe omwe akugwira ntchito pansi pa kufunika kosinthasintha.

edgeAndIot.title: Edge Computing & IoT Intelligence
edgeAndIot.description: Tikutsimikizira zochitika-kusonkhana ndi m'mphepete inference mapangidwe kuti zimathandiza mofulumira zosankha m'deralo pamene kusunga ulamuliro central, auditability, ndi chitsanzo moyo kayendetsedwe kake.

adaptiveCapacityPlanning.title: Kukonzekera Mphamvu Zosinthika
adaptiveCapacityPlanning.description: Ma prototypes a labu amatsimikiziridwa motsutsana ndi ntchito zoyerekeza kenako ndikuphatikizidwa mu njira zowonongeka za nsanja.

operationalIntelligence.title: Nzeru Zogwirira Ntchito
operationalIntelligence.description: Mapaipi a NLP amachoka pazoyeserera zolamulidwa kupita ku ntchito zothandizira kupanga kuti mupange mwachangu komanso kuzindikira bwino.

optimizationInDeliverySystems.title: Kukhathamiritsa mu Njira Zoperekera
optimizationInDeliverySystems.description: Njira zosinthika zomwe zimayesedwa mu labu zimamasuliridwa kukhala injini zowonongeka kwa ndandanda ndi kugawidwa.

edgeDecisioning.title: Kusankha M'mphepete
edgeDecisioning.description: IoT ndi kuyesa kwa m'mphepete mwa inference kumalimbikitsidwa kukhala ntchito zochepa za latency ndi zopinga zodalirika zokhwima.

now.title: Maziko Ogwiritsira Ntchito AI
now.description: Wonjezerani ma tempuleti ogwiritsidwanso ntchito a chitsanzo, zipinda zowunikira, ndi miyezo yowonera m'magulu onse a mankhwala.

next.title: Ntchito Zodziyimira pawokha
next.description: Gwiritsani ntchito makina ogwiritsira ntchito makina omwe amachepetsa chiopsezo chotumizira ndikufupikitsa mayankho otumizira.

twelveToEighteenMonths.title: Nzeru za m'mphepete
twelveToEighteenMonths.description: Sinthani zomangamanga zamtambo wa hybrid pafupi ndi nthawi yeniyeni m'malo okhudzidwa ndi latency.

longHorizon.title: Njira Zopitilira Kukonza
longHorizon.description: Gwirizanitsani kuyesera, kuyang'anira, ndi kukonza kuti machitidwe athe kusintha bwino pamene nkhani zikusintha.

aiReliability.title: Machitidwe a AI a Engineering omwe Amakhala Odalirika Pakupanga
aiReliability.summary: Lingaliro lothandiza pakulinganiza liwiro loyesera ndi kayendetsedwe ka kupanga.

distributedArchitecturePatterns.title: Njira Zogawidwa Zomangamanga za Mapulatifomu Apamwamba
distributedArchitecturePatterns.summary: Zolemba zam'munda kuchokera ku mayesero a zomangamanga zomwe zimayang'ana pa ntchito, kupirira, ndi kuphweka kwa ntchito.

roadmappingAppliedRd.title: Roadmapping Ntchito R &D kwa Zotsatira za Bizinesi
roadmappingAppliedRd.summary: Momwe timapangira njira zatsopano kotero kuti zopezedwa zimachokera ku chitsanzo kupita ku mtengo woyezeka.

cta.title: Pangani ndi Horizon Innovation Lab
cta.description: Thandizani nafe kuti mutsimikizire malingaliro ofunitsitsa mwachangu ndikusunthira malingaliro otsimikiziridwa kukhala njira zotetezeka, zowonongeka.

hero.title: Machitidwe a AI ogwiritsidwa ntchito
hero.description: Chidule chothandiza cha momwe Horizon imapangira, kugwiritsira ntchito, ndi kugwiritsa ntchito makina ophunzirira makina kuchokera ku prototype mpaka kupanga.

machineLearningPipelines.title: Mapaipi Ophunzirira Makina
machineLearningPipelines.description: Kupanga AI kumayamba ndi mapaipi obwezeretsanso omwe amalumikiza deta, kuyesera, kutsimikizira, ndi malingaliro.

modelDeploymentPatterns.title: Zitsanzo Zogwiritsira Ntchito Zitsanzo
modelDeploymentPatterns.description: Njira yotumizira imasankhidwa potengera zofunikira za latency, kutsutsa kwa bizinesi, ndi zovuta zogwirira ntchito.

mlopsOperatingModel.title: Chitsanzo Chogwirira Ntchito cha MLOps
mlopsOperatingModel.description: Machitidwe a MLOps amatsimikizira kuti machitidwe a AI amakhala odalirika, olamulira, komanso osinthika pamene ntchito ikukula.

monitoringAndReliability.title: Kuwunika ndi Kudalirika
monitoringAndReliability.description: Kuwona kumatseka kuzungulira pakati pa khalidwe lachitsanzo ndi zotsatira zogwirira ntchito.

dataAndFeatureEngineering.title: Data ndi Feature Engineering
dataAndFeatureEngineering.description: Versioned deta ingestion, macheke khalidwe, ndi matanthauzo reusable mbali kulenga maziko odalirika maphunziro chitsanzo.

modelDevelopment.title: Chitukuko cha Model
modelDevelopment.description: Kuyesera kumatsatiridwa ndi makonzedwe obwezeretsanso, zolinga zolinga, ndi maziko oyerekeza okha.

validationAndSafetyGates.title: Kutsimikiziridwa ndi Zipata Zachitetezo
validationAndSafetyGates.description: Zitsanzo zofunsira zimadutsa magwiridwe antchito, kulimba, ndi macheke a ndondomeko asanavomereze kuti atulutsidwe.

operationalFeedbackLoops.title: Njira Zogwirira Ntchito
operationalFeedbackLoops.description: Pambuyo pa kutumizidwa kwa telemetry kumadziwitsa zofunikira kuphunzitsanso, zosankha zobwezeretsanso, ndi kukonzekera kwa iteration yotsatira.

realTimeInferenceServices.title: Ntchito Zenizeni za Inference
realTimeInferenceServices.description: Ma API otsika kwambiri a ntchito zogwirizana ndi autoscaling, caching, ndi kuwonera kwa pempho.

batchAndStreamingPredictions.title: Batch ndi Streaming Predictions
batchAndStreamingPredictions.description: Mapaipi okonzedwa ndi zochitika zoyendetsedwa ndi zolemba zapamwamba kwambiri pa analytics ndi ntchito zogwirira ntchito.

edgeAwareDeployment.title: Kutumizidwa kwa M'mphepete
edgeAwareDeployment.description: Hybrid mtambo-m'mphepete kutumikira zitsanzo kwa malo amafuna inference m'deralo ndi centralized chitsanzo kayendetsedwe kake.

ciCdForModels.title: CI / CD ya Zitsanzo
ciCdForModels.description: Makina omanga, kuyesa, ndi kutulutsa ntchito zimachepetsa chiopsezo chotumizira pamene akusunga liwiro loperekera.

modelRegistryAndLifecycle.title: Model Registry ndi Lifecycle
modelRegistryAndLifecycle.description: Versioned chitsanzo zojambulajambula ndi magawo kukwezedwa, mzere, ndi chivomerezo workflows bwino kulamulira ndi traceability.

servingInfrastructure.title: Kutumikira Zomangamanga
servingInfrastructure.description: Scalable kutumikira zigawo ndi njira rollout monga canary ndi mthunzi deployments kuthandiza otetezeka kusintha kasamalidwe.

monitoringPillars.predictionQualityAndDriftDetection: Kuneneratu khalidwe ndi kudziwika kwa drift
monitoringPillars.dataQualityRegressionAlertsAndRemediatio: Zidziwitso za regression khalidwe la deta ndi ntchito zowongolera
monitoringPillars.auditabilityForComplianceAndIncidentAnal: Kuwunika kwa kutsatira ndi kusanthula zochitika

cta.title: Scale Applied AI ndi Chidaliro
cta.description: Ngati mukukonzekera njira za AI zomwe zimafunikira zotsatira zoyeza komanso kusungidwa kwa nthawi yayitali, Horizon ingathandize kupanga ndi kugwiritsa ntchito moyo wonse wa dongosolo.

hero.title: NLP ya zilankhulo zambiri
hero.description: Fufuzani mphamvu zothandiza zogwiritsira ntchito chinenero chachilengedwe komanso momwe zimakhalira kukhala njira zodalirika, zopangira zilankhulo zambiri.

foundations.title: Maziko a NLP
foundations.description: Kusintha kwa chilankhulo chachilengedwe kumaphatikiza zizindikiro za chilankhulo ndi makina ophunzira kuti atulutse tanthauzo, cholinga, ndi kapangidwe kuchokera ku malemba.

workbench.title: Interactive NLP Workbench
workbench.description: Gwiritsani ntchito chiwonetserocho kuti muyese kudziwika kwa chinenero, zolemba malingaliro, kutulutsa mabungwe, ndi makhalidwe omasulira munthawi yeniyeni.

productionApplications.title: Momwe Horizon Imagwiritsira Ntchito NLP Pakupanga
productionApplications.description: Mphamvu za NLP zimaphatikizidwa mu ntchito zamalonda ndi ma guardrails ogwira ntchito komanso ma metrics omveka bwino a khalidwe.

reliabilityAndGovernance.title: Mfundo Zodalirika ndi Ulamuliro
reliabilityAndGovernance.description: Kupanga NLP kumafuna zambiri kuposa khalidwe lachitsanzo; zimadalira njira zotetezeka zoyendetsera komanso kutsimikiziridwa kosalekeza.

foundations.intro1: Machitidwe amakono a NLP amapatsa mphamvu zothandizira makina, kufunika kofufuzira, kutulutsa chidziwitso, ndi mgwirizano wa zilankhulo zambiri. Kugwiritsa ntchito bwino kumafuna khalidwe lachitsanzo komanso maulamuliro amphamvu ogwira ntchito.
foundations.intro2: Ku Horizon, timayang'ana pa machitidwe omaliza a NLP omwe amaphatikiza chidziwitso cholimba ndi kuwonera, kayendetsedwe kake, ndi zotsatira zoyezeka zopanga.

languageDetection.title: Kuzindikira kwa Chilankhulo
languageDetection.description: Amazindikiritsa chilankhulo kuchokera ku zigawo zazifupi kapena zazitali za malemba kuti atsogolere zopempha mu payipi yoyenera yowonongeka.

sentimentAnalysis.title: Kusanthula kwa Malingaliro
sentimentAnalysis.description: Amatulutsa cholinga cha malingaliro ndi polarity kwa nzeru za makasitomala, chithandizo cha triage, ndi mayankho a mankhwala.

entityExtraction.title: Kutulutsa kwa Entity
entityExtraction.description: Amazindikira mabungwe olinganizidwa monga mayina, makampani, malo, ndi masiku kuchokera ku malemba osakonzedwa.

translation.title: Kutanthauzira
translation.description: Amathandizira ntchito za zilankhulo zambiri pomasulira zolemba zopangidwa ndi ogwiritsa ntchito kapena ogwira ntchito pamene akusunga nkhani.

supportAndTicketIntelligence.title: Thandizo ndi Chidziwitso cha Tiketi
supportAndTicketIntelligence.description: Gawani zopempha zomwe zikubwera mwachangu, cholinga, ndi malingaliro kuti mufulumire kuyendetsa ndi kuyankha.

governedContentOperations.title: Ntchito Zolamulidwa
governedContentOperations.description: Gwiritsani ntchito zosefera za chilankhulo chodziwa ndondomeko ndi macheke odziletsa ndi zolinga zoyezeka komanso zokumbukira.

textDrivenBusinessInsights.title: Chidziwitso cha Bizinesi Yoyendetsedwa ndi Malemba
textDrivenBusinessInsights.description: Phatikizani zochitika kuchokera ku zikalata, ndemanga, ndi kulumikizana kuti mudziwitse njira ndi zosankha zogwirira ntchito.

evaluationByUseCase.title: Kuwunika ndi Ntchito Yogwiritsira Ntchito
evaluationByUseCase.description: Zitsanzo zimayesedwa motsutsana ndi ma datasets enieni a gawo asanasankhe kumasulidwa kupangidwa.

humanInTheLoopSafeguards.title: Chitetezo cha Human-in-the-Loop
humanInTheLoopSafeguards.description: Zolosera zapamwamba zimaphatikizapo njira zowunikira, malamulo owonjezera, ndi zizindikiro zowoneka bwino za chidaliro.

continuousMonitoring.title: Kuwunika Kosalekeza
continuousMonitoring.description: Kuthamanga, latency, ndi kuwonongeka kwa khalidwe kumatsatiridwa mosalekeza kotero kuphunzitsanso ndi kubwezeretsa ndi proactive.

hero.title: Genetic Algorithm Simulation
hero.description: Fufuzani kuwerengera kwa chisinthiko m'malo oyankhulana ndikuwona momwe mfundo zomwezo zimamasulira mu machitidwe opangira kupanga.

scientificFoundation.title: Maziko a Sayansi
scientificFoundation.description: Ma aligorivimu a majini ndi njira zowonongeka za anthu zomwe zimauziridwa ndi kusankha kwachilengedwe ndi kusintha.

interactiveEnvironment.title: Malo Osinthika Ogwirizana
interactiveEnvironment.description: Yendetsani kayeseleledwe kuti muwone kulimbitsa thupi kusintha m'badwo ndi m'badwo ndikuwona momwe kupanikizika kwa kusankha kumakhudzira zotsatira.

productionUse.title: Momwe Horizon Amagwiritsira Ntchito Izi Popanga
productionUse.description: Makina ofufuza omwewo omwe amagwiritsidwa ntchito pachiwonetserochi amadziwitsa mapaipi owongolera omwe amagwiritsidwa ntchito mu machitidwe ogwirira ntchito.

applicationDomains.title: Madera Ambiri Ogwiritsira Ntchito
applicationDomains.description: Kukhathamiritsa kwa chisinthiko ndikofunikira kwambiri m'machitidwe omwe ali ndi zolinga zamphamvu komanso zopinga zotsutsana.

scientificFoundation.intro1: M'malo mofunafuna njira imodzi panthawi imodzi, ma aligorivimu a majini amasintha anthu osiyanasiyana omwe akufuna. M'badwo uliwonse umayesedwa motsutsana ndi ntchito yolimbitsa thupi ndikuwongoleredwa kudzera mu kusankha, kuwoloka, ndi kusintha.
scientificFoundation.intro2: Izi zimapangitsa kuti zikhale zogwira mtima pamavuto apamwamba omwe ali ndi zopinga zopanda liniya, pomwe njira za deterministic zimakhala zosalimba kapena zodula zowerengera.

selection.title: Kusankhidwa
selection.description: Otsatira apamwamba amatha kupulumuka ndikukhudza m'badwo wotsatira.

crossover.title: Kuwoloka
crossover.description: Makhalidwe amphamvu amaphatikizidwanso kuti apange njira zatsopano zofunsira ndi mphamvu zosakanikirana.

mutation.title: Kusintha
mutation.description: Kulamulidwa mwachisawawa kumayambitsa kusiyanasiyana kotero kufufuza sikuyimilira mozungulira optima yakomweko.

convergence.title: Kugwirizana
convergence.description: M'mibadwo yambiri, anthu amapita ku njira zokhazikika, zapamwamba.

resourceScheduling.title: Ndandanda ya Resource
resourceScheduling.description: Timagwiritsa ntchito njira zosinthika kuti tiwongolere nda zambiri zomwe kufufuza kwamphamvu sikungatheke.

architectureTuning.title: Kusintha kwa Zomangamanga
architectureTuning.description: Makonzedwe a zomangamanga omwe amasankhidwa amayesedwa mobwerezabwereza kuti apititse patsogolo ntchito ndi mtengo wamtengo wapatali.

continuousOptimization.title: Kukhathamiritsa Kosalekeza
continuousOptimization.description: Ntchito zowonongeka zimayenda m'njira zolamulidwa ndi mayankho a telemetry kotero machitidwe amasintha pamene mbiri yofunikira imasintha.

routeAndLogisticsPlanning.title: Njira ndi Kukonzekera Logistics
routeAndLogisticsPlanning.description: Kukonzekera kovuta koperekera ndi kutumiza kumapindula ndi kufufuza kwa chisinthiko pamene zopinga zimasintha mofulumira.

modelAndHyperparameterSearch.title: Chitsanzo ndi Hyperparameter Search
modelAndHyperparameterSearch.description: Kufufuza kwa majini kumatha kupeza mawonekedwe apamwamba a chitsanzo pamene malo ofunikira ali phokoso komanso osakhala a linear.

portfolioAndAllocationProblems.title: Mavuto a Portfolio ndi Kugawa
portfolioAndAllocationProblems.description: Kukhathamiritsa pansi pa zolinga zopikisana kumatha kupangidwa ngati malonda olimbitsa thupi kudutsa magulu osinthika.
